listing.job_title: Senior Software Engineer II, Vehicle Intelligence

qualifications: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
8+ years of professional software development experience
Experience designing and delivering highly-available, scalable cloud-based systems
Backend service experience in multiple managed languages such as Go, Java, Python, or similar
Experience with frontend technologies including React or Angular
Experience working with SQL or NoSQL data stores such as MySQL, Cassandra, Elasticsearch
Ability to leverage AI agents & tools for appropriate tasks
responsibilities: Impact development and design by launching new features and initiatives
Set a high technical bar through code and architecture design reviews
Collaborate across Product, Design, and Engineering to create integrated solutions that delight customers
Identify and implement improvements to engineering processes with long-term thinking
Build services that meet high availability and low latency requirements in a mission-critical space
Scale APIs, cloud services, and ingestion pipelines
Work with the latest Agentic AI engineering tools (Claude, OpenAI/Codex, Cursor)
required_skills: Backend development in Go, Java, Python, or similar languages
Frontend development with React or Angular
Working with SQL databases (MySQL) and NoSQL stores (Cassandra, Elasticsearch)
Building and scaling APIs and ingestion pipelines
Distributed systems and full-stack service design
Using AI agents/tools such as Claude, OpenAI/Codex, Cursor
culture_signals: Mission-driven focus on protecting life and public safety
Fast-paced, challenging, and meaningful work with ownership
Hybrid in-office collaboration (on-site Tuesdays‑Fridays) to foster teamwork and mentorship
Values candor, care, and diverse perspectives from customers, communities, and teammates
Emphasis on mentorship, shared success, and continuous learning
Commitment to diversity, equity, inclusion, and equal opportunity employment
Supportive benefits including mental wellness, learning & development programs, employee resource groups, and office snacks
Encouragement to apply even if not meeting every listed qualification
Focus on environmental, health, and safety responsibility
